ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview or summary of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie in USD */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue of the movie in USD */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average user rating for the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of user ratings for the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie director */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie creator */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the movie */,
  "tmdb_id" INTEGER /* TMDB ID of the movie */,
  "poster_path" TEXT /* Poster path of the movie */,
  "backdrop_path" TEXT /* Backdrop path of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_companies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "director_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "creator_name" TEXT /* Name of the creator */,
  "creator_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the creator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. admin, moderator, subscriber) */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the user (e.g. basic, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 10) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watch_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watch history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who watched the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being watched */,
  "watch_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was watched */,
  "watch_time" TEXT /* Time the movie was watched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_formats" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_regions" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "region_id")
)
column_names: Overview or summary of the movie
Runtime of the movie in minutes
Budget of the movie in USD
Revenue of the movie in USD
Average user rating for the movie
Number of user ratings for the movie
Role of the user (e.g. admin, moderator, subscriber)
Subscription plan of the user (e.g. basic, premium)
ID of the user who made the rating
ID of the movie being rated
